languages.text: "Фиксирую вылет грузового шаттла в сторону нашего корабля".
"Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."
languages.original_text: "Фиксирую вылет грузового шаттла в сторону нашего корабля".

traits.locale_text: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."
"Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."
"Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."

languages.text: 「貨物シャトルの打ち上げを、我々の船に向けたコースで登録している」
languages.original_text: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."

traits.locale_text: 「貨物シャトルの打ち上げを、我々の船に向けたコースで登録している」

languages.text: «Registrado el lanzamiento de una lanzadera de carga con rumbo a nuestra nave».
languages.original_text: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."

traits.locale_text: «Registrado el lanzamiento de una lanzadera de carga con rumbo a nuestra nave».

languages.text: "Registriere den Start eines Frachtshuttles mit Kurs auf unser Schiff."
languages.original_text: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."

traits.locale_text: "Registriere den Start eines Frachtshuttles mit Kurs auf unser Schiff."

languages.text: « Détection du lancement d'une navette de transport à destination de notre vaisseau. »
languages.original_text: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."

traits.locale_text: « Détection du lancement d'une navette de transport à destination de notre vaisseau. »

languages.text: “侦测到一艘货运穿梭机已发射，航线指向我方舰船。”
languages.original_text: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."

traits.locale_text: “侦测到一艘货运穿梭机已发射，航线指向我方舰船。”

languages.text: "Gemimize doğru rota çizen bir kargo mekiğinin fırlatıldığı bilgisi kaydedilmekte."
languages.original_text: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."

traits.locale_text: "Gemimize doğru rota çizen bir kargo mekiğinin fırlatıldığı bilgisi kaydedilmekte."
